---
title: "Fig3B. MSL2 positive ratio quantification"
author: "Jie Hua"
date: 2026-04-07
lang: en
date-modified: 2026-04-07
keywords: ["MSL2","IF","Quantification"]
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    section-divs: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-copy: hover
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: tango
editor: visual
---

# Load required packages

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
```

# Read the quantification result

Define the csv file

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

# Define the paf file
csv_file <- "F:\\Big Paper\\Processed data\\Fig3B_Dosage compensation_IF_MSL2\\Quantification.csv"
```

Read the file

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

dt <- fread(csv_file)
```

Calculate the ratio and plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


my_family <- "sans"

# 保存原始列顺序
my_order <- colnames(dt)

# 宽表转长表
long_dt <- melt(
  dt,
  variable.name = "Sample",
  value.name = "Value"
)

# 去掉 NA
long_dt <- long_dt[!is.na(Value)]

# 统一转字符，避免 1/2 有时是数值有时是字符
long_dt[, Value := as.character(Value)]

# 统计每个 sample 中每个类别的数量
count_dt <- long_dt[, .N, by = .(Sample, Value)]

# 构造所有 sample 都有一个 Value == "2" 的组合
all_sample_2 <- data.table(
  Sample = my_order,
  Value = "2"
)

# 补全缺失的 "2"
count_2_dt <- merge(
  all_sample_2,
  count_dt[Value == "2"],
  by = c("Sample", "Value"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

# 没有 2 的样本补 0
count_2_dt[is.na(N), N := 0]

# 计算每个 sample 总数
total_dt <- long_dt[, .(total = .N), by = Sample]

# 合并并计算比例（保留 0~1 小数用于作图）
plot_dt <- merge(count_2_dt, total_dt, by = "Sample")
plot_dt[, proportion := N / total]

# 百分比标签
plot_dt[, label := sprintf("%.1f%%", proportion * 100)]

# 横向图时，为了让显示顺序和原始列顺序一致，需要 rev()
plot_dt[, Sample := factor(Sample, levels = rev(my_order))]

# 画图
p <- ggplot(plot_dt, aes(x = Sample, y = proportion)) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    width = 0.7,
    fill = "#61649F",
    color = NA,
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = label),
    hjust = -0.1,
    size = 2,
    family = my_family,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1.3),
    breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    minor_breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    guide = guide_axis(minor.ticks = TRUE),
    expand = c(0.03, 0.03)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = c(0.1, 0.1)
  ) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "X territory cells (%)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    # Transparent backgrounds
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    
    # Grid
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    
    # Border
    panel.border = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 0.1
    ),
    
    # Avoid double-thick borders
    axis.line = element_blank(),
    
    # Axis text
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 6,
      color = "black",
      family = my_family
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 6,
      color = "black",
      family = my_family
    ),
    
    # Axis titles
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 7,
      color = "black",
      family = my_family
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 7,
      color = "black",
      family = my_family
    ),
    
    # Major ticks
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(
      linewidth = 0.2,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(
      linewidth = 0.2,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(1.5, "pt"),
    
    # Minor ticks
    axis.minor.ticks.x = element_line(
      linewidth = 0.1,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.minor.ticks.length.x = unit(0.8, "pt"),
    
    # No legend
    legend.position = "none",
    
    # Panel spacing
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    
    # Plot margin
    plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 2, b = 0, l = 2)
  )+
  guides(
      fill = guide_legend(
        keywidth = unit(6, "pt"),
        keyheight = unit(6, "pt"),
        ncol = 1,
        bycol = TRUE,
        label.position = "right",
        label.hjust = 0,
        override.aes = list(
        colour = NA,
        alpha = 0.95
      )
      )
    )
```

# Save the plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

p_canvas <- p+ggview::canvas(45,30,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
p_canvas
#ggsave( "quantification.pdf",p,dpi=900,units="mm",width=45, height=30)
```
